description_long: This object is a long, antique-style flintlock rifle featuring a wooden stock and a lengthy, octagonal metal barrel. The stock is crafted from polished wood, smoothly contoured for shoulder support, and includes a curved buttplate. The lock mechanism is prominently visible, with a flint striking system and a metal trigger guard beneath. The barrel is metallic, likely steel, and extends well beyond the stock, with simple iron sights mounted on top. The rifle lacks modern attachments, giving it a classic, historical appearance, and the overall finish is a mix of matte wood and slightly glossy metal.
description: A long, antique flintlock rifle with a polished wooden stock and an extended metal barrel, featuring a classic flintlock firing mechanism.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, with the wooden stock, flintlock mechanism, and long metal barrel clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front-on view down the barrel, highlighting the narrow profile and the circular muzzle opening.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the wooden stock, trigger guard, and the length of the barrel from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the lock mechanism partially visible.
